mapper.insert: INSERT INTO store ( product_id, title, lprice, image, brand, category2, category3 ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{title}, #{lprice}, #{image}, #{brand}, #{category2}, #{category3} )
mapper.select: SELECT product_id, title, lprice, image, brand, category2, category3 FROM store ORDER BY product_id DESC
SELECT product_id, title, lprice, image, brand, category2, category3 FROM store WHERE category2=${category2} ORDER BY product_id DESC
